# Dock.StaticItem

**Device Management Profile**

Items that are located on the Documents side of the Dock and cannot be removed from that location.

## Declaration

```swift
object Dock.StaticItem
```

## Objects

- **Dock.StaticItem.Tile-data**: The dictionary that contains details about a Dock item.

items.description: The dictionary that contains details about a Dock item.
items.name: Dock.StaticItem.Tile-data

title: Dock.StaticItem
